description: Style Notelocomotive comes up with this basic printed tee crafted from super soft fabric, that's just right for layering - style wise and comfort wise! Wear this with your khaki shorts and an informal blazer (with boat shoes) for an upscale casual event (or during a vacation). You can also style this with your tried and true denim favourite for an easy everyday look.Product DetailsPurple T-shirt, has graphic print in the front, decorative stitch detailing, round neckline and short sleevesMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash at 40 degrees with like coloursDo not bleachTumble dry normal or line Use warm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
